title: xyris calostachys
intro: Xyris calostachys, also known as the Golden Sedge or Yellow-eyed Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xyris calostachys include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional rituals and ceremonies in some cultures.
